Document:
# Detective
“I’m being called over the radio, make that Whiskey to-go.”
-Can act as a [bold][color=#004d75]Security Officer[/bold][/color], so long as it does not impede their job responsibilities.
-Can go undercover, but must keep their [bold][color=#004d75]Security[/bold][/color] issued-ID on their person at all times, as well as getting verbal confirmation from the [bold][color=#DB9D3B]Head of Security[/bold][/color] ahead of time.
## Responsible For: - Interrogations. - Collecting Evidence. - Performing Investigations.
Standard [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color] Equipment:
or
in
